scripts.dogfood:url-shortener: node packages/core/dist/cli.js lint --spec examples/url-shortener/spec.md && node packages/core/dist/cli.js lint --design examples/url-shortener/design.md --specs-root . && node packages/core/dist/cli.js lint --plan examples/url-shortener/plan.md && node packages/core/dist/cli.js matrix --spec examples/url-shortener/spec.md --plan examples/url-shortener/plan.md && npx vitest run examples/url-shortener
